india_trends.title: Silver price today steady near ₹2.44 lakh/kg as Middle East tensions, Fed cues keep investors cautious
india_trends.summary: Silver prices remained steady amid escalating US-Iran tensions. In India, MCX silver held at ₹2,43,927 per kg, while international spot silver rose 0.1% to $72.76 per ounce. Geopolitical risks support silver, but a firm interest rate outlook limits price gains.

india_trends.title: Recode Studios IPO Day 1: SME IPO opens today; check GMP, subscription status, and other details
india_trends.summary: Recode Studios launched its IPO on May 5, aiming to raise ₹44.59 crore with a price band of ₹150-158 per share. The IPO includes fresh shares and an offer for sale, with allotment expected on May 8 and listing on BSE SME on May 12.

india_trends.title: OnEMI Technology Solutions IPO Day 3: Issue subscribed 60% so far. Check GMP, review, key details. Apply or skip?
india_trends.summary: OnEMI Technology Solutions IPO was 60% subscribed by the second day, with QIBs at 1.45 times and retail investors at 16%. The IPO closes on May 5, with a price band of ₹162-171. Analysts have mixed views on its valuation and risks related to unsecured loans.
